homeScreen.descDirasakan: Displays earthquake events whose vibrations are felt by humans and reported in the surrounding area.
homeScreen.descTerdeteksi: Displays earthquakes recorded by seismographs, but not felt by humans.
homeScreen.descTsunami: Displays the latest tsunami early warning information from BMKG.

historicalProcessModal.legendUpdate: Each row = one parameter update since the earthquake was detected
historicalProcessModal.footerNote: * Real-time parameter update data from the BMKG system

tentangAplikasiScreen.title: About App
tentangAplikasiScreen.desc1: is a cutting-edge seismic activity monitoring platform specifically designed to map earthquake data in real-time across Indonesia.
tentangAplikasiScreen.desc2: This application serves as an early disaster mitigation solution, making it easier for the public to access earthquake parameters such as magnitude, depth, and coordinates instantly.
tentangAplikasiScreen.desc3_1: Our flagship features include a location-based (GPS) automatic alarm notification system. Currently, the early warning feature is optimized specifically for the
tentangAplikasiScreen.desc3_2: region to ensure more precise data accuracy.
tentangAplikasiScreen.desc4_1: All presented data is sourced directly from
tentangAplikasiScreen.desc4_2: as the official authority, ensuring the accuracy of the information you receive.
